title: Junior Revenue Manager at Celebi India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Celebi India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Celebi India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Celebi India International Enterprises:
Celebi India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
